summary: Code quality is solid (type hints, error handling, modular design) but deliverable is incomplete and non-functional. CRITICAL: workflow references missing test_validator.py and fixtures/secrets.json—workflow will fail immediately. No act-result.txt or evidence of actionlint validation. Task explicitly required TDD with test file first, fixtures, act harness, and validation proof; none provided. validator.py missing return type annotation on classify(). `--break-system-packages` in pip install is questionable. Incomplete deliverable cannot ship.
